title: Matekxy 2022 AirPods Pro 2nd Generation Case with Silicone Lanyard, Full Protection Shockproof and Dustproof Portable Cover with Keychain, Support Apple AirPods Wireless Charging - Red
description:
Matekxy AirPods Pro 2nd silicone case is designed for the new 2022 AirPods Pro 2nd only.
The AirPods Pro 2nd Case Cover is a one-piece design, with the top cover connected to the cover.
It fits tightly with the AirPods Pro 2nd and will not come off as easily.
After putting the protective cover on the headset, the LED light is visible so you can know if the case is charging or if it is fully charged.
There is also a small flag at the bottom to be able to cover the charging port. Covering the small flag when not charging will effectively prevent dust from entering.
In addition, you can hang it outside your backpack or on your hand with the configured keychain and lanyard, very convenient to carry.
What you'll get:
AirPods Pro 2nd Silicone Case
Silicone Lanyard
Black Keychain
features: Match Model: Matekxy simple, sophisticated and stylish AirPods case will accurately match the AirPods Pro 2 released in 2022. Good-looking, easy to use, and able to protect the headphones in all aspects.

Upgraded Shockproof Silicone Material: Light-weight Airpods Pro 2nd generation case skin case is made of soft-touch durable silicone material, completly protecting against fingerprint, scratches, bumps, anti-shock and anti-slip.
Convenient Charging: Front LED visible design and the bottom opening lightning charging design makes charging easier, support wire and wireless charging (But Not For Apple Watch Charger).

Portable Design: Portable travel designed Airpods Pro 2 case cover with carabiner Silicone Lanyard and Keychain. The removable rope and keychain are easy to attach to key ring, belt or computer bag which makes it convenient and secure to carry your Airpods Pro 2 anywhere.
Package Include: 1 * case for Airpods Pro 2nd generation 2022, 1 * Metal Buckle, 1 * Silicone Lanyard

reviews.title: Ear piece hook
reviews.text: Comfort is relative to the design itself and not necessarily due to product. Durability is also related to how you handle placing the ear piece on. It’s very stiff and allows very little flexibility so subject to snap in pieces. As for the value it’s right on the money. Especially since I was unable to find a replacement locally (Romania). Despite the additional cost of shipping it was still better than buying a new Jabara headset. Also it arrived earlier than expected which was greatly appreciated.

reviews.title: Over-the-top quality

The braided cable is substantial. The connectors are copper, high quality, and fit snugly. If you don't mind the price, these are very nice cables.

reviews.title: Works with iPhone 13
reviews.text:
This appears to use analog out over Lighting rather than having a DAC in the cable. Evidence is that there is volume control similar to using headphones rather than the no volume when plugged into an audio interface. Also if you touch the connector while plugged into speakers you get the sort of popping and cracking found when messing with a headphone cable.

So in summary, it just works.

reviews.title: Excellent product
reviews.text: I typically don't care for in-ear headphones but got these so I can talk on my cell while doing chores around the house.  They not only came the same day, but they fit my S21+ perfectly and the sound is great!  I'm so glad I took the plunge and purchased them.  Also love the little case they came with.  Great price for everything.

reviews.title: Phone does not ring in earbuds.
reviews.text: I would have given a 5-star review, but my S20 FE 5G rings out loud for everyone to hear rather than in the earbuds.  I purchased these earbuds to listen to music at the office.  When my phone rings, the volume of the ring matches the volume of the music, which would be fine, except that it's not ringing in the earbuds.  It rings out loud, which disturbs those around me.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

[24H Playing Time & Enhanced by PALOVUE iSound APP ] PALOVUE wireless charging case keeps you and your iSound on the go, up to 24 hours of wireless playtime with the compact charging case; PALOVUE iSound APP can set the results of different times of touching the headset according to your preferences, such as increasing or decreasing the volume, answering calls, etc.

[ CVC 8.0 Noise Cancelling & 4 Mics ] Equipped with build-in 4 microphone and CVC 8.0 algorithm noise cancelling technology, PALOVUE bluetooth wireless earbuds can reduce most of the ambient noise, provides you crystal clear calls.

reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

reviews.title: Not quite a perfect fit, but works well
reviews.text: Purchased for a 6-yr-old Sony MDR-ZX750BN. A tight fit to get the zipper closed, yet there is a bit of extra on the side that connects with my head. The cover is about a centimeter short of full coverage. That said, it is comfortable; and that is what is important. This should last at least another 6 years, making the little bit I paid well worth it.

reviews.title: Fits perfectly on ATH-M50. Nice stretchy neoprene means they fit a lot more headphones than what's listed.
reviews.text: My Audio-Technica ATH-M50 is still by far my favorite wired headphone, but I haven't been using them because of the cheap black vinyl on the M50 headband that is famous for peeling off and leaving flakes all over your head. This band fit perfectly. See attached pics.

reviews.title: Perfect for me
reviews.text: I have an expensive pair of V-Moda headphones that I couldn't bear replacing even if the headband piece was coming apart. This worked perfectly for my needs! No more headband peeling or foam in my hair!

reviews.title: This headband cover was just what I needed!
reviews.text: The Geekria headband cover was purchased to replace the Sony piece that was deteriorating after a couple of years of usage.  This replacement headband cover is very comfortable. It was a little bit of a challenge to install (it goes directly over the old headband) but once on, it works great. I would buy it again.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.
